mapper.insert:
SELECT APPROVALDEPUTYREG_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO approvalDeputyReg ( deputyRegId, delegatorEmpId, deputyEmpId, deputyName, docId, startDate, endDate, reason, regTypeCode, regEmpId, isActive, regDate ) VALUES ( #{deputyRegId}, #{delegatorEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deputyEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deputyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{docId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT r.deputyRegId, r.delegatorEmpId, r.deputyEmpId, r.deputyName, r.docId, r.reason, r.regTypeCode, r.regEmpId, r.isActive, TO_CHAR(r.startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(r.endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, TO_CHAR(r.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, d.deptName AS deputyDept, cc.codeName AS deputyGrade FROM approvalDeputyReg r LEFT JOIN employee2 e2 ON r.deputyEmpId = e2.empId LEFT JOIN department d ON e2.deptCode = d.deptCode LEFT JOIN commonCode cc ON e2.gradeCode = cc.code AND cc.codeGroup = 'RANK' WHERE r.delegatorEmpId = #{empId} ORDER BY r.deputyRegId DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT r.deputyRegId, r.delegatorEmpId, r.deputyEmpId, r.deputyName, r.docId, r.reason, r.regTypeCode, r.regEmpId, r.isActive, TO_CHAR(r.startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(r.endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, TO_CHAR(r.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, d.deptName AS deputyDept, cc.codeName AS deputyGrade FROM approvalDeputyReg r LEFT JOIN employee2 e2 ON r.deputyEmpId = e2.empId LEFT JOIN department d ON e2.deptCode = d.deptCode LEFT JOIN commonCode cc ON e2.gradeCode = cc.code AND cc.codeGroup = 'RANK' WHERE r.deputyRegId = #{deputyRegId}
SELECT deputyEmpId, deputyName FROM approvalDeputyReg WHERE delegatorEmpId = #{delegatorEmpId} AND isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN startDate AND endDate AND ROWNUM = 1
